expectations.evidence: Title: 'Portfolio Review - index.astro'; findings reference the file

expectations.text: Output contains three distinct review layers or sections
expectations.evidence: Single numbered list, no Layer 1/2/3 structure

expectations.text: Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
expectations.evidence: No severity labels used; findings are all treated equally

expectations.text: Layer 1 has at least 3 distinct findings
expectations.evidence: No Layer 1 defined; overall 8 findings but not layered

expectations.text: At least one finding includes a concrete suggested fix (not just 'this is bad')
expectations.evidence: Every finding has a 'Fix:' line with concrete suggestion

expectations.text: Output flags missing <main> or landmark elements
expectations.evidence: Finding #8: 'Missing semantic HTML (nav, main, footer elements)'

expectations.text: No evidence of editing src/ files
expectations.evidence: Read-only; agent explicitly noted it could not write files
